Bash(node -e 'require\('\\''dotenv'\\''\).config\(\); const p=require\('\\''./src/lib/prisma'\\''\); \(async\(\)=>{const q=await p.quotazione.findMany\({where:{createdAt:{gte:new Date\('\\''2026-06-03'\\''\)}},include:{giocatore:{select:{nome:true,squadra:true}}},orderBy:{createdAt:'\\''desc'\\''}}\);const napoli=q.filter\(x=>x.giocatore.squadra==='\\''Napoli'\\''\); for\(const x of napoli\)console.log\(x.giocatore.nome\); await p.$disconnect\(\);}\)\(\)')

Bash(node -e 'require\('\\''dotenv'\\''\).config\(\); const p=require\('\\''./src/lib/prisma'\\''\); \(async\(\)=>{const g=await p.giocatore.findMany\({where:{nome:{contains:'\\''Milink'\\'',mode:'\\''insensitive'\\''}},include:{quotazioni:{orderBy:{createdAt:'\\''desc'\\''},take:3}}}\);for\(const x of g\){console.log\('\\''#'\\''+x.id,x.nome,'\\''squadra='\\''+x.squadra,'\\''active='\\''+x.active,'\\''valore='\\''+x.valore\);for\(const q of x.quotazioni\)console.log\('\\''  quot'\\'',q.id,q.createdAt.toISOString\(\),q.valore\);} await p.$disconnect\(\);}\)\(\)')

Bash(node -e 'require\('\\''dotenv'\\''\).config\(\); const p=require\('\\''./src/lib/prisma'\\''\); \(async\(\)=>{const g=await p.giocatore.findMany\({where:{nome:{contains:'\\''Addai'\\'',mode:'\\''insensitive'\\''}},include:{contratti:{include:{fantaTeam:{include:{user:{select:{nickname:true}}}}}}}}\);for\(const x of g\){console.log\('\\''#'\\''+x.id,x.nome,'\\''active='\\''+x.active,'\\''squadra='\\''+x.squadra,'\\''valore='\\''+x.valore\);for\(const c of x.contratti\){console.log\('\\''  C#'\\''+c.id,c.tipo,'\\''valido='\\''+c.valido,'\\''team='\\''+c.fantaTeam.nome,'\\''pres='\\''+c.fantaTeam.user?.nickname,'\\''prov='\\''+c.provenienza,'\\''dest='\\''+c.destinazione,'\\''stip='\\''+c.dataStipula,'\\''fine='\\''+c.dataFine,'\\''importo='\\''+c.importoOperazione\);}} await p.$disconnect\(\);}\)\(\)')

Bash(node -e 'require\('\\''dotenv'\\''\).config\(\); const p=require\('\\''./src/lib/prisma'\\''\); \(async\(\)=>{const c=await p.contratto.findUnique\({where:{id:364}}\);console.log\('\\''PRIMA:'\\'',c\); const upd=await p.contratto.update\({where:{id:364},data:{tipo:'\\''Prestito'\\'',dataFine:'\\''07-2026'\\''}}\);console.log\('\\''DOPO:'\\'',upd\); await p.log.create\({data:{azione:'\\''UPDATE'\\'',entita:'\\''contratto'\\'',entitaId:364,dettaglio:JSON.stringify\({tipo:'\\''fix-tipo-prestito'\\'',prima:{tipo:c.tipo,dataFine:c.dataFine},dopo:{tipo:'\\''Prestito'\\'',dataFine:'\\''07-2026'\\''},motivo:'\\''Jayden Addai: contratto erroneamente Acquisto, era Prestito'\\''}\),adminId:2}}\); await p.$disconnect\(\);}\)\(\)')
